title: mentha × niliaca var. rosanii
intro: Mentha × niliaca var. rosanii, also known as Rosan Mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae, characterized by its distinctive fragrance and purple flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosan Mint include reducing nausea and digestive issues, as well as alleviating symptoms of headaches and sore throats. Rosan Mint can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and aromatherapy.
